lex.bot.waitandcontinuespecification.Con.Description: The response that Amazon Lex sends to indicate that the bot is ready to continue the conversation.

lex.bot.waitandcontinuespecification.IsA.Description: Specifies whether the bot will wait for a user to respond. When this field is false, wait and continue responses for a slot aren't used and the bot expects an appropriate response within the configured timeout. If the IsActive field isn't specified, the default is true.

lex.bot.waitandcontinuespecification.Sti.Description: A response that Amazon Lex sends periodically to the user to indicate that the bot is still waiting for input from the user.

lex.bot.waitandcontinuespecification.Wai.Description: The response that Amazon Lex sends to indicate that the bot is waiting for the conversation to continue.
